about.title: About Elite Market
about.subtitle: An independent luxury discovery platform for the UAE — we curate, you buy direct.
about.p1: Elite Market is a curation platform, not a store. We don't hold inventory and we never process payments. Instead, our editors handpick the finest perfumes, watches, eyewear and beauty — then link you straight to trusted retailers like Amazon and Noon to buy at the best available price.
about.p2: The luxury market is noisy. Thousands of products, inflated claims, and very little honesty about what's actually worth your money. We exist to cut through that — with a ruthless shortlist and reviews that name the trade-offs, not just the highlights.
about.p3: Every link is an affiliate link. If you buy through us we may earn a small commission, at no extra cost to you. That keeps the platform free and our incentives simple: recommend only what we'd buy ourselves.
about.v1Body: Only the finest make the list — quality over quantity, always.
about.v2Body: Real pros and cons. We tell you who a piece is for, and who it isn't.
about.v3Body: We send you to Amazon or Noon. Your payment never touches us.
about.v4Body: A native experience in both Arabic and English.

disclosure.title: Affiliate Disclosure
disclosure.subtitle: How Elite Market makes money — in plain language.
body: Elite Market is an independent curation platform. The product links on this site are affiliate links to retailers such as Amazon and Noon.
When you click a link and buy on the retailer's site, we may earn a small commission. This comes at no extra cost to you — you pay the same price you would have anyway.
We never process your payment or handle your card details. Every purchase is completed securely on the retailer's own website.
Affiliate commissions keep this platform free to use. They never change which products we recommend — our shortlist is based on quality and value, not commission rates.
Prices shown on Elite Market are indicative and may differ from the live price on the retailer's site. Always confirm the final price at checkout.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: What we collect, and what we don't.
privacy.intro: Elite Market respects your privacy. We collect as little data as possible and never sell it.

sections.b: We don't require accounts and we don't process payments, so we don't collect names, addresses or card details. If you subscribe to our newsletter, we store the email address you provide. We use privacy-respecting, aggregate analytics to understand which pages are useful.
We use only essential cookies needed for the site to function and for language preference. We do not use intrusive advertising trackers.
When you click a product link, the destination retailer (e.g. Amazon, Noon) may set its own cookies to attribute the referral. Their privacy policies govern that data once you leave our site.
You can unsubscribe from the newsletter at any time using the link in any email. To request deletion of your email from our list, contact us.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.subtitle: The basics of using Elite Market.
terms.intro: By using Elite Market you agree to these terms.

sections.b: Elite Market is a curation and discovery platform. We are not a retailer. We do not sell products, hold inventory, process payments, or ship orders. All purchases happen on third-party retailer sites.
Links on this site are affiliate links. We may earn a commission on qualifying purchases at no extra cost to you. See our Affiliate Disclosure for details.

We work to keep product information accurate, but prices, availability and specifications are set by the retailers and can change at any time. Always confirm details on the retailer's site before buying.
Content on Elite Market is provided for information only and without warranty. Any purchase, and any product warranty or return, is solely between you and the retailer.
The Elite Market name, brand and original content are ours. Product names and imagery belong to their respective owners.
